productDisplayName: Nike Men As Rafa Ace T Blue T-Shirts
description: Composition Blue crew neck -shirt made of 58% cotton/42% polyester, engineered with dri-Fit technology and has screen-print at front Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean Inspired by the legend Rafael Nadal, train and play with passion in this Rafa Ace Graphic men's t-shirt that comes in a classic fit with sweat-wicking fabric and an inspired graphic.
